name: Pull Binding As Pattern Branch Source
description: x ? { T <- u8 -> 1 } — branch where source is a PointingPull. parse_branch expects Pointing or Product; PointingPull is neither. WILL_FAIL_UNTIL_FIX: parse_branch must accept PointingPull as a branch carrier with source=from, product=to. Semantic intent: in a branch like 'T <- u8 -> 1', T is a hole, u8 fills it, then -> 1 is the product.
